The following events took place in '''206 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Krozurbian war]] begins around this [[Standard year/Legends|year]].<ref name="Krozurbian war">According to ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Droids]]'', the story featured in [[Star Wars: Droids (1995)|''Star Wars Droids: Season of Revolt'']] is set five and a half [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which puts it in [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]]. Between the [[Droids (1995) 5|first]] and [[Droids (1995) 8|fourth]] issue, 200 years of Krozurbian [[Krozurbian war|war]] were brought to an end, placing the war's start in or around 206 BBY.</ref>

==Births==
*[[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] on [[Thisspias/Legends|Thisspias]]<ref name="NEGTC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' states that Oppo Rancisis is 174 years old as of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Although this year is not stated outright in the source material, simple mathematics arrives at a birth date of 206 BBY.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-04-23 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' {{Imo}}
